item.title:
Oh yes all the time, like my https://t.co/stNvarWNRq game server is Node JS, front end is full JS
A...
item.description:
Oh yes all the time, like my https://t.co/stNvarWNRq game server is Node JS, front end is full JS
And https://t.co/6TyHKaj8lb last year was a Python server, and I'm trying Rust too
So I have become (like many) language ambiguous
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 22 | 🔁 0 | 💬 3 | 👁 4394
item.author: @levelsio

item.title:
📻 Also added team radio with real radio voices generated by ElevenLabs (not affiliated)
The AI play...
item.description:
📻 Also added team radio with real radio voices generated by ElevenLabs (not affiliated)
The AI players also use the team radio when they need you etc and give you their location on the map if they need backup for example https://t.co/7LdowRCxXn
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 20 | 🔁 0 | 💬 2 | 👁 3745
item.author: @levelsio
